story.artifact_power: The source that warps gravity across the island.
story.greeting: Pirate, your island mission begins now — listen closely.
story.act1: On Antigravity Island, where rocks float and the sky twists beneath your feet, a flying monkey patrols the air, striking anyone who dares to enter. Its movements are unnatural — guided by the unseen hand of our greatest enemy, Doctor Krit. At the island's core drifts the Gravity Anchor, the source of its power. Pirate, we must reach it, shut it down, and free the flying monkey from Krit's control before the island collapses into chaos.
story.act2: The flying monkey tightens its patrol across the sky. Every floating rock Pirate steps on pulses with corrupted energy — but the path to the Gravity Anchor is becoming clear.
story.act3: The Gravity Anchor is within reach. One final push and Doctor Krit's hold over this floating island will be broken forever.
story.goal: Pirate, master every math trial, reach the island's core in time, and break Doctor Krit's hold.

theory.title: The Heart Cap Must Be Shared Fairly!
story: The monkey shaman uses magical mushrooms to control the island.
To break the spell, Pirate must share the mushrooms fairly.
When a mushroom is split into equal parts, each piece becomes a fraction.

stages.title: Pirate lands on Antigravity Island
stages.mechanic_reason: Five tasks per round builds fluency with core addition and subtraction facts.
stages.success_message: Well done, Pirate! The floating shore is yours!

stages.title: Pirate collects sky crystals
stages.mechanic_reason: Two-step word problems build conceptual understanding of addition and subtraction.

rounds.title: Pirate collects sky crystals
rounds.prompt: Pirate has 3 sky crystals. He finds 4 more. Then he uses 2. How many crystals does he have now?

rounds.title: Floating drones fly away
rounds.prompt: Pirate has 8 drones. 3 fly away. Then 2 new drones arrive. How many drones does Pirate have now?

rounds.title: Energy cells on the island
rounds.prompt: Pirate finds 4 energy cells. Then finds 3 more. Then gives 1 away. How many cells remain?

rounds.title: Repairing the gravity bridge
rounds.prompt: Pirate has 7 bridge parts. He finds 2 more. Then uses 3 parts. How many are left?

rounds.title: The path to the Gravity Anchor
rounds.prompt: Pirate collects 5 keys. Then finds 4 more. Then loses 2. How many keys does Pirate have now?

stages.title: Gravity waves form a pattern
stages.mechanic_reason: Pattern sequences train recognition of arithmetic progressions.

stages.title: Pirate checks the signal
stages.mechanic_reason: True/false checks understanding of addition and subtraction facts.

stages.title: Two floating crates
stages.mechanic_reason: Corridor choice trains comparison — which side has more.
stages.success_message: Correct path, Pirate! The Gravity Anchor is in sight!

rounds.title: Two energy stations
rounds.question: Which station has more energy cells?

rounds.title: Near the Gravity Anchor
rounds.question: Which side has more sky crystals?

stages.title: Pirate reaches the Gravity Anchor
stages.mechanic_reason: The boss stage mixes all mechanics for a final multi-skill challenge.
stages.success_message: Pirate, you've shut down the Gravity Anchor and freed the island!

rounds.title: The storm around the Anchor grows stronger
rounds.prompt: Pirate has 4 gravity crystals. He finds 3 more. Then he uses 2 crystals. How many crystals does he have now?

rounds.title: The monkey attacks from above
rounds.prompt: Pirate has 8 flying drones. 2 fly away. Then 3 new drones arrive. How many drones does Pirate have now?

rounds.title: The floating rocks reveal a secret
The Gravity Anchor sends a signal
Pirate compares two energy stations
rounds.question: Which station has more energy cells?

rounds.title: The monkey guards the final path
rounds.question: Which crate has more gravity crystals?

rounds.title: Final strike! Free the flying monkey
